menu_options.cloud: Authenticate via Tuya Cloud Account to retrieve configuration data (Easiest)

cloud.title: Tuya Cloud Authentication
cloud.description: Enter your Tuya Developer account credentials to look up local hardware security keys.

device_details.title: Manual Device Specifications
device_details.description: Fill out the exact hardware connection tokens for your local MoeBot.

progress.cloud_fetch: Fetching devices attached to your Tuya Cloud account...
progress.local_scan: Scanning local network for matching MoeBot hardware...

error.invalid_ip: The provided IP address formatting is invalid.

error.unknown: An unhandled software or connection loop error occurred.
